message:
feat(fp-frame): add str.startswith/endswith na parameter parity (frankenpandas-dvzt)

Adds StrAccessor::startswith_with_na, endswith_with_na, and their
startswith_any_with_na / endswith_any_with_na tuple equivalents
matching pandas 2.2 Series.str.startswith(pat, na=...) semantics.
na=None propagates nulls as NaN (pandas default). na=Some(true/false)
replaces null entries with that boolean in the result. Shared helper
str_boolean_with_na centralizes the per-element dispatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
